publications.title: Analytical Estimate of Damages Caused by the June 24, 2026 Earthquakes in Venezuela
publications.description: This document constitutes a first estimate of the direct physical damage, obtained through analytical modeling, of the effects caused by the earthquakes of June 24, 2026 in Venezuela.

publications.title: UNDRR ONEA & GETI Newsletter 50: Apr-Jun 2026
publications.description: In the second quarter of 2026, UNDRR ONEA-GETI has significantly expanded global disaster risk reduction (DRR) and climate resilience capacities through a series of high-impact training of trainers (ToT) workshops, multi-agency certificate programmes, and

publications.title: Building a safer society through science and technology: a compendium of Korea’s science and technology-based disaster management
publications.description: This casebook highlights the implementation of science and technology-based disaster management, featuring 24 Korean practices across four thematic areas, along with Korea's success factors and remaining challenges. It is available in English and Korean.

publications.title: Financing heat resilience
publications.description: This report explores how governments can finance heat resilience through risk-informed investments, innovative financing mechanisms, and resilient infrastructure to protect lives, livelihoods, and economies from rising extreme heat risks.

publications.title: Knowing what the weather will do: A guide for practitioners on impact-based early warning
publications.description: This guidebook provides a novel approach and methodology for designing and implementing Impact-based early warning (IbEW) systems. it guides the co-development and integration of risk knowledge on hazards, exposure, vulnerabilities

publications.title: 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction
publications.description: This outcome document of the 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction.

publications.title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning: Guidance and sectoral templates
publications.description: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

publications.title: A framework towards assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services (FRAME-ECO)
publications.description: This report introduces a framework for assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
publications.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

publications.title: UNDRR Annual Report 2025
publications.description: The UNDRR Annual Report 2025 presents several important achievements that UNDRR marked in the year 2025
